mapper.select: SELECT ER_SEQNO AS SEQNO, ER_PUSERNO AS PUSERNO, ER_GB AS GB, ER_CURRNM AS CURRNM, ER_TYPE AS TYPE, ER_FIT_RATE AS FIT_RATE, ER_PUSH_DAY AS PUSH_DAY, ER_PUSH_TIME AS PUSH_TIME FROM TMB_EXRATE_MGT WHERE ER_PUSERNO = #{serno}
mapper.update: UPDATE TMB_EXRATE_MGT SET ER_TYPE = #{type}, ER_FIT_RATE = #{fitRate}, ER_PUSH_DAY = #{pushDay}, ER_PUSH_TIME = #{pushTime} WHERE ER_PUSERNO = #{puserno} AND ER_SEQNO = #{seqNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TMB_EXRATE_MGT ( ER_SEQNO, ER_PUSERNO, ER_GB, ER_CURRNM, ER_TYPE, ER_FIT_RATE, ER_PUSH_DAY, ER_PUSH_TIME, REGSIT_DT ) VALUES ( (select CASE WHEN MAX(ER_SEQNO) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE MAX(ER_SEQNO)+1 END from TMB_EXRATE_MGT), #{puSerno}, #{gb}, #{currnm}, #{type}, #{fitRate}, #{pushDay}, #{pushTime}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TMB_EXRATE_MGT WHERE ER_PUSERNO = #{puSerno} AND ER_SEQNO = #{seqNo}
